description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a padded headband and two circular ear cups connected by a flexible band. The ear cups are cushioned and appear to be made of synthetic leather or foam for comfort during extended use. A cable extends from one of the ear cups, terminating in a standard audio jack, indicating a wired connection. The headphones are predominantly black, with a matte finish on the headband and ear cups. The design is utilitarian and robust, suitable for both casual and professional audio use. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort for urban environments such as public transport, parks, or workspaces.
description: A pair of black, over-ear wired headphones with cushioned ear cups and a flexible headband, featuring a single audio cable.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the padded headband and both ear cups, with the cable extending outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the ear cups and the curvature of the headband.
description_view_2: Bottom-up view displaying the underside of the headband and the full length of the audio cable.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, showing the ear cups' profile and the cable's attachment point.
